data.title: Despite recent news of Polygon 2.0 upgrade and successful Binance listing for POL token, MATIC price faces pressure, trading bearishly with RSI at 38 after 21% surge.
data.description: The cryptocurrency MATIC is currently experiencing a downtrend in trading, with its Relative Strength Index (RSI) at a low of 38. This is notable despite the recent announcement of the Polygon 2.0 upgrade and a successful listing of the POL token on Binance, which led to a significant 21% price increase earlier in the week.

data.title: DOGE price drops to $0.23, down 7.15% in 24h despite institutional interest. Volatility spikes as profit-taking pressure clashes with buying.
data.description: The price of DOGE has dropped to $0.23 following a significant sell-off, marking a 7.15% decrease in the last 24 hours. The market is experiencing conflicting signals as institutional purchases are met with substantial profit-taking activities.
